nasb.text: Loyalty and truth preserve the king, And he upholds his throne by righteousness.

esv.text: Steadfast love and faithfulness preserve the king, and by steadfast love his throne is upheld.

cnv.text: 慈愛和信實保護君王， 他的王位也藉慈愛維持。

ccb.text: 君王靠慈爱和忠信护佑， 他的王位因慈爱而稳固。

csbs.text: 慈爱和信实守护君王， 他的宝座也靠慈爱扶持。
